_publications._publicationTitle: Integrative genomic analyses of neurofibromatosis tumours identify SOX9 as a biomarker and survival gene.

_contextSnippet: DNA microarrays to profile the gene expression in normal Schwann cells, Schwann cells cultured from primary benign neurofibromas (dermal and plexiform subtypes), MPNST cell lines and solid tumours
details: MPNST cell line used in DNA microarray gene expression profiling to identify gene programmes normally expressed at neural crest stage
